# full-server

Broad CR exercising unmap writers for server product settings not covered elsewhere

!!! tip "Direction: `to`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `to` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/to/full-server` |

## Input

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  server:
    urls:
    - https://argocd.example.com
    - https://argocd-alt.example.com
    oidc:
      insecureSkipVerify: true
    logs:
      maxPodsToRender: 15
    ui:
      cssURL: ./custom/my-styles.css
      bannerContent: Hello there!
      bannerURL: https://argoproj.github.io
      bannerPermanent: true
      bannerPosition: top
      loginButtonText: SSO Login
    users:
      anonymousEnabled: true
      sessionDuration: 12h
      passwordRegex: "^.{10,}$"
    help:
      chatURL: https://mycorp.slack.com/argo-cd
      chatText: Chat now!
      binaryURLs:
        linux-amd64: https://example.com/argocd-linux-amd64
    googleAnalytics:
      trackingID: UA-999
      anonymizeUsers: true
    exec:
      enabled: true
      shells:
        - bash
        - sh
    statusBadge:
      enabled: true
      url: https://badge.example.com/
    webhook:
      maxPayloadSize: 25M
      refreshJitter: 30s
      refreshJitterThreshold: 5
    rbac:
      default: role:readonly
      scopes:
        - groups
      matchMode: glob
      policyCSV: |
        p, role:readonly, applications, get, */*, allow
      applicationFineGrainedInheritanceEnabled: false
  controller:
    instanceLabelKey: example.com/app
    resourceTrackingMethod: label
    allowedNodeLabelKeys:
      - topology.kubernetes.io/zone
    sync:
      impersonation:
        mode: optional
      requireOverridePrivilegeForRevisionSync: true
  cluster:
    inClusterEnabled: true
  installationID: install-from-cr
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  additionalUrls: |
    - https://argocd-alt.example.com
  application.allowedNodeLabels: topology.kubernetes.io/zone
  application.instanceLabelKey: example.com/app
  application.resourceTrackingMethod: label
  application.sync.impersonation.enabled: "true"
  application.sync.impersonation.enforced: "false"
  application.sync.requireOverridePrivilegeForRevisionSync: "true"
  cluster.inClusterEnabled: "true"
  exec.enabled: "true"
  exec.shells: bash,sh
  ga.anonymizeusers: "true"
  ga.trackingid: UA-999
  help.download.linux-amd64: https://example.com/argocd-linux-amd64
  installationID: install-from-cr
  oidc.config: |
    {}
  oidc.tls.insecure.skip.verify: "true"
  passwordPattern: ^.{10,}$
  server.maxPodLogsToRender: "15"
  server.rbac.disableApplicationFineGrainedRBACInheritance: "true"
  statusbadge.enabled: "true"
  statusbadge.url: https://badge.example.com/
  ui.cssurl: ./custom/my-styles.css
  ui.loginButtonText: SSO Login
  url: https://argocd.example.com
  users.anonymous.enabled: "true"
  users.session.duration: 12h0m0s
  webhook.maxPayloadSizeMB: "25"
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  policy.csv: |
    p, role:readonly, applications, get, */*, allow
  policy.default: role:readonly
  policy.matchMode: glob
  scopes: '- groups'
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
```
